titleStmt.title: SII 10.479: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 479. (A.R. No. 179 of 1905.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1216. (Jaya)

summary.p: States that general Aḍidam Malu (Mallu ?) who was the right-hand man of Rudradēva and the chief minister of Pratāpa Rudradēva consecrated the image of goddess Trailōkya-Sundarī and celebrated the marriage of that goddess and Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva and that the temple authorities undertook to celebrate the marriage festival annually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastanarapatimaṇimakuṭakiraṇacuṁbitacaraṇakamala kākatikula
tilaka śrīmatpratāparudradēvamahārājasāṁbrājyadhuraṁdhara Abhaṁgarāhutta
rāyasāḷuvagajaviphāḷu jagadoru mmulāmanumagaṁḍagōpāḷaśiraḥ
khaṁḍana mīsaragaṁḍa javanikanārāyaṇa nāmādipraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahārā
yasakalasēnādhipati rudradēvadakṣiṇabhujādaṁḍa śrīrāmadēvadivyaśrīpā
dabhaktu laina śrīmatu Aḍidaṁmaluṁgāru svasti śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1216 Agu nēṁṭi jayasaṁvatsara phālguṇa śu 15 gu . nāṁḍu trailōkya
sundari yaniyeḍi pēranu suvarṇapratima gānu gaurīdēvi viccēyinci śrī
tripurāṁtakaśrīmanmahādēvaraku vivāhamahōtsavatirunāḍlu sēyiṁ
ci Īyutsavānaku valasina Upakaraṇālu Aṁtavaṭṭūnu sama¨rpiṁcina
nu Asaṁkhyātamāhēśvarulūnu gurudēvarānu śrītripurāṁtakadēvarabā
hattaraniyōgālavārūnu saṁtōṣiṁci Īvivāhamahōtsavatirunā
ḍlu sū¨ryyacaṁdrulu kalaṁtagālamūnu Ēṁṭānu cēyiṁcu vārugā
nūnu Īdēvidēvaralaku Upahārālāku nityamūnu dēvikini Ēṁdumu
vaḍlūnu dēvaraku Ēṁdumu vaḍlūnu naḍapuvārugānūnu śrītripu
rāṁtakadēvara saṁnidhini Iyyakoniri Īdha¨rmmamu dēvara vibhavama
hōtsavamugāna Īdha¨rmuvu dapakuṁḍā naḍapinavāru śrīpa¨rvatamu
nānu vārāṇasini kurukṣētramunaṁdūnu Anēkakōṭigōvulu dānamu
sēsina phalamunnu Ī yīṭhāvulaAṁdu Anēkaśatakratuvulu sēsina
phalamunnu boṁduduru
dalaṁcina Anēkakōṭigōbrāhmaṇavadhasēsina pā
pānam digoṭṭunaṁ lāṁbaḍuduru . sva
ttānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa sva
dattaṁ bhavatādēvanu
ścaladhvajāpaṭastaṁbhassamu
dha¨rmasya kālē kalā
illegible
Digital edition of SII 10.479 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
